behavior_summary: This script provides two simple processes for a wall lamp item: a U8P_LAMP2::look (examine) handler that shows a short description, and a U8P_LAMP2::use handler that replaces/transforms the item instance in the world.
U8P_LAMP2::look emits the single bark "wall lamp " when the player examines the object and then ends the U8P_LAMP2::look process.

U8P_LAMP2::use invokes the engine routine FREE::changeItemType with the lamp's coordinates (Y adjusted by -0x20) and a target type id 0x025E, causing the item to be replaced/changed in-place (inferred visual/instance transformation).
notable_control_flow: U8P_LAMP2::look: linear flow — display a single bark then suspend/terminate; no branching or flag checks.
U8P_LAMP2::use: linear flow — single external call to FREE::changeItemType; no branching, menus, or flag manipulation.
open_questions: What concrete in-game variant does item type 0x025E represent (exact visual/state difference)? — inferred but not known from script.
What is the semantic purpose of the numeric parameter 0x01 passed to FREE::changeItemType (option/flag)?
Why is the Y coordinate adjusted by -0x20 for the replacement placement — layering/offset behavior inferred but not confirmed.

main_function.name: U8P_LAMP2::look
main_function.purpose: Handle player 'U8P_LAMP2::look' (examine) action for the wall lamp; display a short identifying description to the player.
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine when the player examines/looks at this item (process type 0x0208 / U8P_LAMP2::look handler).

function_map.name: U8P_LAMP2::look
function_map.role: Present a short description when the player examines the lamp.

function_map.name: U8P_LAMP2::use
function_map.role: Handle the 'U8P_LAMP2::use' action by transforming/replacing the item instance via an engine call.

function_map.name: FREE::changeItemType
function_map.role: Engine routine to change/replace an item instance at given coordinates and with given type/options (called by U8P_LAMP2::use).

external_calls.purpose: Replace/transform the current item instance in the world by creating/applying item type 0x025E at the lamp's coordinates (Item::getZ(this), Item::getY(this) - 0x20, Item::getX(this)) with option 0x01; 'this' is passed as the item reference.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script provides two simple processes for a wall lamp item: a U8P_LAMP2::look (examine) handler that shows a short description, and a U8P_LAMP2::use handler that replaces/transforms the item instance in the world.
